summary: Iteration 133: Verified all 5 bug fixes - Habit proof upload accepts body, Dashboard eye icon toggle works with localStorage persistence, Trade Monitor TARGET uses exitValue, LOT size uses truncation (math.trunc), and streak calculation skips weekends/holidays including Presidents Day 2026
critical_code_review_comments: Backend habits.py: HabitCompleteRequest body model correctly accepts screenshot_url (line 170-171)
Backend server.py: truncate_lot_size helper function uses math.trunc (line 785-789)
Backend calculations.py: calculate_lot_size uses math.trunc for 2-decimal truncation (line 436-441)
Backend trading_days.py: get_us_market_holidays includes Presidents Day (3rd Monday February) (lines 55-58)
Frontend DashboardPage.jsx: valuesHidden state toggles currency KPI cards, persists to localStorage 'hideAccountValues'
Frontend DashboardPage.jsx: Eye icon (EyeOff/Eye) on Account Value and Total Profit cards (line 426-429)
Frontend TradeMonitorPage.jsx: TARGET in Trade Control section uses exitValue (line 1846)
Frontend api.js: completeHabit sends body {screenshot_url} instead of query params (line 380)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 133 verified all 5 bug fixes: (1) Habit proof upload - POST /api/habits/{id}/complete now accepts HabitCompleteRequest body with screenshot_url field, (2) Dashboard eye icon - toggleValuesHidden function toggles 'hideAccountValues' in localStorage, shows **** when hidden for currency KPI cards (Account Value, Total Profit), (3) Trade Monitor TARGET - line 1846 now uses exitValue instead of dailySummary.total_projected, ensuring TARGET and Projected Exit show same value, (4) LOT size truncation - math.trunc(balance/980*100)/100 gives 0.01 for $16.13 (not 0.02 from rounding), (5) Streak holidays - trading_days.py includes Presidents Day Feb 16 2026 in get_us_market_holidays set
